LanguageData.BS_ParasiteTargetNotImpaired: Target must be impaired, stunned, in great pain, or unaware.
LanguageData.BS_ParasiteTargetTooSmall: Target is too small to parasite.
LanguageData.BS_InTooMuchPain: In too much pain to use.
LanguageData.BS_TooLargeToSwallow: Target is too large to engulf.
LanguageData.BS_EngulfedVomit: {0} threw up due to internal damage, pain, or reduced digestive ability.
LanguageData.BS_EngulfedColonist: {0} swallowed {1}! {1} will try to fight their way out as long as they are not downed. Pain or injuries to {0}'s stomach and torso will free them.
LanguageData.BS_RestoreAutoPregnancyDesc: Enable auto-pregnancy, letting random pregnancies occur again.
LanguageData.BS_EnoughAutoPregnancyDesc: Disable randomly getting auto-pregnancies. Does not affect ongoing pregnancy
